mapper.select: SELECT MIN(uc.id) as id, c.coupon_id as couponId, c.title, c.scope_type as scopeType, c.threshold, c.discount_amount as discountAmount, c.end_time as endTime, COUNT(uc.id) as userNum FROM user_coupons uc INNER JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND #{totalPrice} > c.threshold AND c.end_time > #{now} AND ( c.scope_type = 1 OR (c.scope_type = 2 AND c.scope_id = #{hotelId}) ) GROUP BY c.coupon_id, c.title, c.scope_type, c.threshold, c.discount_amount, c.end_time
